blended.narrative: Whistler Blackcomb is expecting flurries over the next 48 hours with trace amounts. Snow levels around 1,302 ft. Looking ahead, 22 inches possible over the next 14 days.

daily_summary.narrative: Monday: 6" of snow, highs of 43°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.
Tuesday: 6" of snow, highs of 45°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.
